summary: W1444 connects the W1443 W945 localized-unit component to the W1306 repack: the W945 component from W1007 repacks judgmentally, exposes the localized right adjoint, localized adjunction, and W939 unit-component witness, and exposes the nine-input W730/W944/W973/W719/W722/endpoint/right-adjoint/adjunction/W939 surface; product success remains false because no positive OriginalFourTaskProductSuccess witness exists and the final imported completion surface still proves productSuccessClaimed=false.

Final imported completion surface remains nonterminal: originalFourTaskContractCompletion.productSuccessClaimed = false still compiles.

Original four mathematical tasks remain open under the positive-witness supplement; W1444 identifies the W730/W944/W973/W719/W722/endpoint/right-adjoint/adjunction/W939 unpack of the W945 localized-unit surface rather than completing the four-task product witness.
remaining_work: Continue Lean implementation toward a positive OriginalFourTaskProductSuccess-style declaration backed by actual exact-category, metrizable LCA exact-category, Yoneda-Ext, and bounded derived infinity-category constructions.

Close or replace the W730/W944/W973/W719/W722/endpoint/right-adjoint/adjunction/W939 unpacked surface with actual constructions that satisfy the positive-witness supplement instead of cycling through existing nonterminal provider packages.
